rationale: Both methodologies active in marker; cross-methodology informs declared in external_edges; target CI-001 resolves in helix-infra's instance index. Exit 0. Negative anchors guard against the four cross-methodology error codes (I101 if cross-id treated as local, I120/I121 if marker/install state misread, G140 if external_edge target methodology mismatched, G104 if external_edge tries required: true).
